story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation: 2 reproducible real sandbox runs across ≥3 executions, 6 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 2 osquery correlations, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
